name: stltexturizer
description: BumpMesh / stlTexturizer. Root manifest exists so the shared js/*.js mesh-processing modules (which import 'three' and 'fflate') resolve those deps from the root node_modules when run headlessly by Node — the MCP server (mcp/) and the bench-*.mjs / diag-*.mjs scripts. The browser app itself uses the CDN import map in index.html and needs no build step.
